title: cremanthodium nepalense
intro: Cremanthodium nepalense, also known as the Nepal cremanthodium or the Himalayan daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Cremanthodium nepalense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Cremanthodium nepalense typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
